# Jokers' Deck

First mentioned: **3305-02-23**  
Last mentioned: **3305-03-09**

## Biography

Jokers' Deck is an exclusive and secretive gambling circle whose members include some of the wealthiest and most powerful individuals in the galaxy — corporate CEOs, senior politicians, minor royals, pirate lords and cartel kingpins. The group operates anonymously and untraceably, with organisers who remain entirely unknown to authorities.

The circle gained notoriety in 3305 through its connection to the Ambrose Foundation scandal. Lady Talitha Ambrose, the foundation's heiress, allegedly lost her family's entire multi-billion credit fortune during a high-stakes game of deadlock poker at Jokers' Deck. Journalist Flint "Firemaker" Lafosse revealed that Talitha had been a member for years, and some attendees believed the game was rigged by players who aimed to exploit her well-known gambling addiction. The case demonstrated how Jokers' Deck functions as a predatory institution that weaponises gambling addiction against its own members, extracting fortunes from even the galaxy's most privileged dynasties. Despite its notoriety, the group remains operational and its organisers have never been identified.
